\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4566 introduces Eigenvalue as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \lambda_L = \sqrt{\frac{m_e}{\mu_0 n_s e^2}} \otimes \kappa_{\text{G-L}} \end{equation}
